transcription.text: Take care of everyone on your Christmas list and save at Dooley's. You'll find over 20 departments of brand-name merchandise. Save when you buy this Toastmaster Serve It Hot, a great Christmas gift that keeps food piping hot till ready to serve for only $15.88. See the complete line of Toastmaster appliances at Dooley's.
